source: EPRA/KPLC Electricity Tariff — Domestic Consumer (DC) Category
fixedChargeNote: KES 150/month billed through prepaid token purchases until fully paid each month

fuelCostCharge.label: Fuel Cost Charge (FCC) per kWh — varies monthly
fuelCostCharge.note: This rate changes monthly based on fuel costs; hardcoded as approximate average

forexAdjustment.label: Foreign Exchange Rate Fluctuation Adjustment (FERFA) per kWh — varies monthly

notes: Prepaid token purchases first deduct outstanding fixed charges before allocating to units
The lifeline tariff (first 10 kWh) is heavily subsidized for low-income households
FCC and FERFA are variable surcharges that change monthly — shown here as approximate averages
VAT at 16% is applied to the total of energy charges + levies
Tariff bands are progressive — only units within each band are charged at that rate
Commercial and industrial tariffs have different rate structures (CI and IT categories)
